final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a warm family reunion dinner scene centered around a Chinese round table with a steaming hot pot.

Style/medium: photorealistic editorial photography, warm documentary family portrait style
Composition: eye-level medium-wide shot encompassing the full round table and all family members, slight overhead tilt to show the hot pot at center
Subject: a multigenerational family gathered around a traditional Chinese round table, raising glasses and laughing together, hot pot bubbling with visible steam rising at the center of the table, dishes and chopsticks spread around
Scene/backdrop: cozy indoor dining room, background wall densely covered with framed family photos and printed snapshots, creating a lived-in, nostalgic atmosphere
Lighting/mood: warm amber-yellow overhead pendant light as key source, soft fill from surrounding walls, intimate and joyful mood evoking 烟火气 and everyday happiness
Color palette: dominant warm amber and golden yellow from the lighting, rich red and earthy tones from the food and tableware, cool photo-wall background as subtle contrast
Materials/textures: steam wisps above the hot pot, glossy lacquered round table surface, matte wall with layered photo prints, fabric clothing with natural wrinkles
Avoid: cold blue tones, studio-flash look, stiff posed expressions, empty background, over-smoothed skin, watermark
